mapper.sql: tpcm.plan_implement_id, tpcm.check_method, tpcm.evaluation_results, tpcm.enabled_flag, tpcm.id, tpcm.create_by, tpcm.update_time, tpcm.create_time, tpcm.update_by

${tAlias}.plan_implement_id as ${tAlias}_plan_implement_id, ${tAlias}.check_method as ${tAlias}_check_method, ${tAlias}.evaluation_results as ${tAlias}_evaluation_results, ${tAlias}.enabled_flag as ${tAlias}_enabled_flag, ${tAlias}.id as ${tAlias}_id, ${tAlias}.create_by as ${tAlias}_create_by, ${tAlias}.update_time as ${tAlias}_update_time, ${tAlias}.create_time as ${tAlias}_create_time, ${tAlias}.update_by as ${tAlias}_update_by
mapper.insert: insert into td_plan_check_method (plan_implement_id, check_method, evaluation_results, enabled_flag, create_by, update_time, create_time, update_by) values (#{planImplementId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{checkMethod,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{evaluationResults,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{enabledFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, #{createBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT})
mapper.update: update td_plan_check_method set plan_implement_id = #{planImplementId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, check_method = #{checkMethod,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, evaluation_results = #{evaluationResults,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, enabled_flag = #{enabledFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, update_by = #{updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT} where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}

update td_plan_check_method set enabled_flag = 0, update_by = #{updateBy, jdbcType = BIGINT}, update_time = getdate() where check_method = #{checkMethod, jdbcType = VARCHAR} and enabled_flag = 1 and plan_implement_id = #{planImplementId, jdbcType = BIGINT}
